scrapedName: Nha Trang Discovery and Beach Break 6 Days

itinerary.title: Nha Trang Arrival
itinerary.description: Upon your arrival in Nha Trang, our tour guide and driver will wait for you and drive you to your hotel in the city center to check in. The rest of the day is your free time to relax after a long flight, or you can freely explore the city on your own. Feel free to get in touch with your travel consultant if you need any suggestions. NOTE: Check-in time is 14:00, early check-in is available with an additional charge.

itinerary.title: Nha Trang Full Day City & Mud Spa Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Today, discover the charm of Nha Trang through its cultural landmarks and natural relaxation spots. The journey begins with a scenic drive to Cau Da Port, where you will visit the Vietnam Oceanographic Institute. This fascinating center houses a wide collection of marine life from Nha Trang Bay and beyond, offering insights into Vietnam’s diverse underwater world. Next, explore the city’s spiritual and architectural highlights with visits to the Long Son Pagoda, home to a giant white Buddha statue, and the Stone Church (Nha Trang Cathedral), an impressive Gothic-style structure built ...

itinerary.title: Nha Trang – Island & Snorkeling Tour
itinerary.description: Your day begins with a transfer from your hotel to Cau Da Port. Before setting sail, stop at the Vietnam Oceanographic Institute, home to an impressive collection of marine life found in Nha Trang Bay. This visit offers a fascinating introduction to the region’s rich underwater world. From the port, embark on a scenic boat cruise to explore Nha Trang’s islands. The first stop is Mun Island, the top destination for snorkeling

itinerary.title: Free Day at Nha Trang
itinerary.description:
Have breakfast at your hotel. Then you can spend the whole day relaxing and discovering the city at your own pace. You can visit the city center, enjoy seafood at restaurants, and take part in many water sports at the nearby beach, or just contact your travel consultant for more suggestions. We also offer many optional tours for you to have a full-filled experience:

Nha Trang Bay Sunset Cocktalk & Dinner Cruise

	

FROM US $80 /pax




Thap Ba Hot Spring & Mud Bath Half-day

	

FROM US $58 /pax




Monkey Island – Doc Let Beach Full day

	

FROM US $52 /pax

itinerary.title: Nha Trang Departure
itinerary.description: After breakfast at your hotel, enjoy some free time to relax, explore Nha Trang at your own pace, or do some last-minute shopping for souvenirs. Depending on your flight schedule, our driver will transfer you to the airport for your departure. Your memorable journey in Nha Trang comes to an end. Wishing you a safe flight and hope to welcome you back to Vietnam soon!

highlights: Discover Nha Trang’s cultural landmarks, from Long Son Pagoda and Po Nagar Cham Towers to the relaxing Thap Ba Hot Spring mud bath.
Embark on an island-hopping and snorkeling adventure to Mun Island, Mot Island, and tranquil beaches with fresh seafood by the sea.
Enjoy leisure time to soak in Nha Trang’s coastal charm, shop for souvenirs, and relax before your departure.
included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double room with air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport in tour - transfer by new modern vehicle
Meals as indicated in the program
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
